creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
This patch adds support for OTR in bitlbee from the bitlbee-otr branch[1].
This patch also adds protocol options to build more accurately, like a
excluding protocol support from being compiled. With OTR, a user can have
an encrypted conversation.

ATM, I'm hosting the bitlbee-otr diff on my pages.google.com account. If this diff
can get be hosted on a freebsd.org or any other mirror, cool.

References:
[1] - http://khjk.org/bitlbee-otr/
